title: Top-Tier Home Care 2-Page Action Plan | Caliperworks
description: A private page for the Top-Tier Home Care 2-page search action plan prepared by Caliperworks.
headline: Your office appears in some of the searches checked, but Google usually shows other providers first.
framing: The best starting point is the small set of service searches where clearer pages and stronger local signals can move you closer to the top.

metrics.label: Care searches where the office appeared in the Google Maps results checked
Average website position across the care searches checked
Care searches where the website appeared in Google's first 100 results

winsHeading: The clearest pattern is room to improve.
noWinsExplanation: No page-one website result or top-three Google Maps result appeared in the 10 care searches checked.

opportunities.evidence: 90 searches/mo · Not seen in the first 20 Maps results checked · Not seen in the first 100 website results checked
opportunities.heading: Reach families in both Google Maps and website results
opportunities.explanation: A focused page for this care need, supported by local proof and matching services on the Google business listing, can address both gaps together.

opportunities.evidence: Not seen in the first 20 Maps results checked · Not seen in the first 100 website results checked

offer.name: 2-page action plan
offer.headline: Leave with a clear first move, not another search report.
offer.promise: This page gives you the diagnosis. The follow-up turns it into a 2-page action plan for this office: what to change first, why it matters, and what can wait.
deliverables: the first service page to improve, with the sections it needs
Google listing changes supporting the same care searches
a 10-search baseline for checking progress
offer.effort: Enter your name and work email. No login, calendar, access request, or obligation to hire us.
offer.exclusivity: During an active engagement, I work with only one client per industry in each city. I will not also work for a direct local competitor.

proof: For another home-care operator, CaliperWorks helped move average Google position from about 33 to 12, increase qualified lead flow year over year, and reduce reliance on Google Ads.
proofQualification: Results depend on market, competition, and implementation.
